title: J.D. Wiker

'''J.D. Wiker''' is a roleplaying game designer who wrote much of the material for the [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]. He served for a time as the "Star Wars answer guy" on the message boards, and was the author of the first fifty "[[Jedi Counseling]]" articles, giving advice and answering questions regarding rules and ideas for the ''Star Wars'' d20 roleplaying game (RPG). He discontinued work on the game when he was laid off from Wizards of the Coast in [[September]] [[2002]]. (He could not legally continue to work as a Star Wars Roleplaying Game freelancer after his position was liquidated, though he was able to work on the Star Wars Miniatures Game ''Ultimate Missions'' series.) He later returned to work on the RPG via the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook|Saga Edition]].

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===Books===
*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'' - November 2000
*''[[Secrets of Naboo]]'' - January 2001
*''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]'' - March 2001
*''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' - August 2001
*''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' - February 2002
*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]'' - May 2002
*''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' - August 2002
*''[[The Clone Wars Sourcebook]]'' (with [[Daniel Wallace]]) - 2003 {{C|Cancelled}}
*''[[Hero's Guide]]'' - June 2003
*''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' - September 2003
*[[Rebel Storm|''Ultimate Missions: Rebel Storm'']] - November 2004
*[[Star Wars Miniatures: Clone Strike|''Ultimate Missions: Clone Strike'']] - February 2005
*[[Revenge of the Sith (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Ultimate Missions: Revenge of the Sith'']] - May 2005
*[[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']] - November 2008
*''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' - January 2009
*''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' - July 2009
